caption: A woman with dark hair styled in a top knot and braids is seated in a studio setting, wearing a dark green t-shirt with red and white text. She sits behind a black microphone on a stand, positioned in front of a black backdrop that features the text "BESS TALK 101" and "About It!". A smaller logo at the bottom of the screen also reads "BESS TALK 101". To her left is a white wall, and above her is a framed picture of a person's hands. Throughout the sequence, the woman is looking down and smiling, with her facial expressions shifting slightly as she appears to be listening or preparing to speak. Her posture remains relatively still, though she subtly tilts her head and shifts her gaze across the frames, maintaining a cheerful demeanor while remaining focused on something off-camera.
